sqlMap.select: select * from valuefield where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.insert: insert into valuefield(dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, field delimiter seq ) values (#dropdownno:NUMERIC#, #propertyno:NUMERIC#, #propertyversionno:NUMERIC#, #metaobjectno:NUMERIC#, #structureno:NUMERIC#, #field# #delimiter# #seq# ) SELECT IDENT_CURRENT('valuefield') as last_insert_id
sqlMap.select: select valuefieldno, field, delimiter, seq, dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from valuefield where valuefieldno = #valuefieldno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.update:
update valuefield set
field = #field# field = null delimiter = #delimiter# delimiter = null seq = #seq# seq = null
where valuefieldno = #valuefieldno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.delete: delete from valuefield where valuefieldno = #valuefieldno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
delete from valuefield where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
sqlMap.select: select valuefieldno, field, delimiter, seq, dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno from valuefield where valuefieldno = #valuefieldno# and dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#

select valuefieldno, dropdownno, propertyno, propertyversionno, metaobjectno, structureno, field, delimiter from valuefield where dropdownno = #dropdownno# and propertyno = #propertyno# and propertyversionno = #propertyversionno# and metaobjectno = #metaobjectno# and structureno = #structureno#
